name: The Fourth Vow
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems
explicitMods: Armour also applies to Chaos Damage taken from Hits
Physical Damage taken bypasses Energy Shield
flavourText: Seek not to avoid the mortal pains of this world.
In flagellation, there lies freedom from temptation.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Performs a warcry, taunting nearby enemies to attack the user, and summoning Mirage Warriors from nearby corpses. The Mirage Warriors each use a linked attack skill once before dissipating.
explicitMods: Counts total Power of Enemies and Corpses in Range
Summons Mirage Warriors from 2 corpses per 5 Power, minimum 1 corpse
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Strike Skills cannot target additional Enemies
Attacks with Supported Skills count as Exerted

Supported Skills are used by Mirage Warriors Summoned by General's Cry
Supported Skills count as Triggered
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports melee attack skills. Those skills will be used by Mirage Warriors summoned by General's Cry. Supported skills cannot be supported by Multistrike.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports melee attack skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 44% increased Area of Effect
Supported Skills have 15% less Attack Speed
Supported Skills deal 49% more Melee Area Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Slashes twice, releasing wide waves of force that damage enemies they hit. Enemies in the middle of the slashes can be hit by both. Requires a Two Handed Axe or Two Handed Sword.
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that deals damage.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 39% more Physical Damage
Supported Skills deal no Chaos Damage
Supported Skills deal no Elemental Damage
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Physical Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Reserves mana based on the supported warcries to cause those warcries to be repeatedly triggered.
explicitMods:
Supported Warcries will Trigger when their Cooldown is over
This Skill's Mana Reservation is the total of the Mana Reservations of Supported Skills, and cannot be further modified
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Skills have 29% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
Supported Warcries are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over
Supported Skills' Base Mana Cost is 10
Supported Warcries do not grant Buffs or Charges to You or Allies
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports warcry skills. Cannot support retaliation skills or modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports melee attack skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 49% more Melee Physical Damage
Supported Skills deal 49% more Damage with Bleeding and Poison caused by Melee Hits
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Melee Physical Damage
Supported Skills have 10% less Attack Speed
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Diamond Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

name: Foulborn Uul-Netol's Kiss
explicitMods: Curse Enemies with Vulnerability on Hit
Exerted Attacks Knock Enemies Back on Hit
flavourText: We feel the Mother's love
and beg to return to her womb.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Desecrates the ground, spawning corpses based on monsters in the current area and dealing chaos damage over time to enemies. If you are using the Raise Spectre skill there is a chance to spawn spectral corpses matching your most recently raised Spectres. Spectral corpses cannot be interacted with except by Minion skills.
explicitMods: Deals 8.2 Base Chaos Damage per second
Spawned corpses' level matches the area level, up to a maximum of Level 20
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any channelling skill, protecting you from damage while you channel it. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: While Channelling a Supported Skill, take 14% less Damage from Hits
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports melee attack skills. Cannot support triggered attacks, attacks used by things other than you, or skills which create minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 5% increased Melee Damage
Supported Skills will Trigger Shockwave on Melee Hit
Supported Skills can only be used with Axes, Maces, Sceptres or Staves
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: The Elder's influence yet lingers
in the darkest corners of Wraeclast.

explicitMods: Shockwave Repeats from up to 4 Enemies in area
Shockwave Repeats deal 50% less Damage with Hits and Ailments
hybrid.secDescrText: Deals attack damage in an area. A number of enemies hit by the wave will release an additional wave.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any non-blessing skill. Minions cannot gain the Lifetap buff.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Cost Life instead of Mana

Gain Lifetap after Spending a total of 273 Life on Upfront
Costs and Effects of a Supported Skill
Supported Skills deal 19% more Damage while you have Lifetap

socketedItems.secDescrText: Channel this skill to move towards a targeted location while spinning constantly attacking enemies in an area around you. While channelling this skill, you cannot be knocked back.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Cast while Channelling
explicitMods: 20% increased Area of Effect per 0.1 metre additional Melee Strike Range

name: Marylene's Fallacy
flavourText: "Marylene stroked the medallion at her breast
before every duel and every cast of the die."
- Victario, the People's Poet

name: The Formless Flame
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Duration Gems
explicitMods: Armour is increased by Overcapped Fire Resistance
flavourText: Our skin turns to ash
and we are swallowed by his brilliant red light.

socketedItems.secDescrText: You must gain Valour from melee combat to use this skill, which will consume all Valour to place a banner with an aura. The aura will be larger and more powerful the more Valour was consumed. The banner lasts for a duration, but will end early if you leave the aura, or use the skill again while it's active.
explicitMods: While you have no placed Banner, you can gain Valour
10% more Area of Effect per Valour consumed
10% more Aura effect per Valour consumed
Banner grants 8% increased Accuracy Rating to You and Allies
Banner grants 4% more Physical Damage with Melee Skills to You and Allies
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

10% more Aura effect per Valour consumed

Banner causes you and Allies to Recover 35 Life when Blocking

flavourText: "The history of Wraeclast is marked by bloody conflicts. The rise
and fall of empires. Man slaughtered man, never suspecting the
madness lurking under the surface might not have been innate."

name: Armageddon Grip
implicitMods: Cannot roll Modifiers of Non-Chaos Damage Types
explicitMods: 16% of Damage taken Recouped as Life
craftedMods: Non-Channelling Skills have -8 to Total Mana Cost
flavourText: We will seize back our wayward Dream.

name: The Writhing Jar
explicitMods:
2 Enemy Writhing Worms escape the Flask when used
Writhing Worms are destroyed when Hit
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: To achieve godhood, they would cast off all that god has gifted us.
Mortality, compassion, even the sanctity of flesh.
- High Templar Voll

implicitMods: Attacks have 20% chance to cause Bleeding
25% chance to Intimidate Enemies for 4 seconds on Hit

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 20% less Damage from Enemies in Aura

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that causes nearby enemies to take more physical damage.
explicitMods:
Nearby Enemies take at least 20% more Physical Damage,
 raising up to 40% as they stay in the Aura for 4 seconds

explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 1077 additional Armour
You and nearby allies gain 50% more Armour

socketedItems.secDescrText: Take less Physical and Elemental Damage for a short time. Consumes up to 5 Endurance Charges to lengthen the buff and further lessen Physical Damage taken. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: 20% increased Buff Duration per Endurance Charge removed
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
15.0% less Physical Damage taken per Endurance Charge removed

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "The science is... incomprehensible at best. Nearest I can tell, the Arcana exhibits
a blast of wrath once it has been fully charged, and when directed at the Elder
will force it to take on the form it held before it entered our dimension."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Gain a buff that makes you faster, harder to detect, and grants Phasing, letting you pass through enemies. Performing any skill replaces this buff with one that boosts melee physical damage of skills you use yourself (it will not apply to your melee skills used by totems). Consumes Frenzy Charges to increase duration.
explicitMods: 100% increased Skill Duration per Frenzy Charge removed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Woespike
implicitMods: Adds 4 to 15 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitMods: Adds 14 to 26 Physical Damage to Attacks
24% chance to Impale Enemies on Hit with Attacks
26% chance on Melee Hit for the Strongest Impale on target to last for 1 additional Hit
flavourText: The old wound lurks deep within,
never healing, never relenting,
making every smile half-hearted.
